category_sources: Savannah project listing describes Kimwitu++ as a meta tool for generating software, especially compilers.
source_facts.description says Kimwitu++ is a tool for processing trees/terms.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kimwitu++; source_facts.homepage is the official Savannah project for Kimwitu++.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Savannah project page and best official documentation surface in the supplied facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; Savannah uses official source-control webviews for project repositories, and kimwitu-pp is the official Savannah project id.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and the official Savannah project description identify tree/term processing and compiler-oriented code generation.
